title: Korean AI startup Upstage says it is in talks to acquire 10K of AMD's MI355 chips, in a bid to "diversify to other chips" as "we have a lot of Nvidia chips" (Bloomberg)
tags: Bloomberg;Korean AI startup Upstage says it is in talks to acquire 10K of AMD's MI355 chips, in a bid to “diversify to other chips” as “we have a lot of Nvidia chips”
